name: type:bug
description: 缺陷反馈(人工测试 / 现场问题)

name: type:chore
description: 工程化、脚本、CI、非业务改动

name: scope:infra
description: CI / scripts / build / docs 工具链;本仓库单 app 不细分模块

name: status:triaged
description: AI 已分诊,确认范围与类型

name: status:plan-review
description: 修复方案已产出,进入 AI 评审

name: status:ship-review
description: PR 已创建,进入上线前 AI 评审

name: status:needs-human
description: AI 判定需要人工介入,等待决策

name: status:blocked
description: 外部依赖阻塞(前置 / 环境)
